Title: Test Data Manager - Get Data
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. Data Manager retrieves user data from the database
3. Data Manager returns the user data
Expected Result: The user data is returned correctly

Title: Test Data Manager - Update Data
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User updates their data
3. Data Manager updates the user data in the database
4. Data Manager returns a success message
Expected Result: The user data is updated correctly and a success message is returned

Title: Test Data Manager - Check Authentication
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to access the application
2. Data Manager checks the user's authentication status
3. Data Manager returns an error message
Expected Result: The user is not authenticated and an error message is returned

Title: Test Data Manager - Request Data
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. Data Manager requests data from the user
3. User provides valid data
4. Data Manager processes the data and updates the user's consumption
5. Data Manager returns a success message
Expected Result: The user's consumption is updated correctly and a success message is returned

Title: Test Data Manager - Delete Report
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User requests to delete a report
3. Data Manager deletes the report from the database
4. Data Manager returns a success message
Expected Result: The report is deleted correctly and a success message is returned

Title: Test Report - Generate Report
Test Steps:
1. User provides consumption data
2. Report generates a comment based on the consumption data
3. Report returns the generated comment
Expected Result: The comment is generated correctly based on the consumption data

Title: Test Report - Generate Commento
Test Steps:
1. User provides invalid consumption data
2. Report generates a comment based on the consumption data
3. Report returns the generated comment
Expected Result: The comment is generated correctly based on the invalid consumption data

Title: Test User Profile - Get User Profile
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User Profile retrieves the user's profile data
3. User Profile returns the user's profile data
Expected Result: The user's profile data is returned correctly

Title: Test User Profile - Update Profile
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User updates their profile data
3. User Profile updates the user's profile data in the database
4. User Profile returns a success message
Expected Result: The user's profile data is updated correctly and a success message is returned

Title: Test Achievements - Add Achievement
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User earns an achievement
3. Achievements add the achievement to the user's account
4. Achievements return a success message
Expected Result: The achievement is added correctly to the user's account and a success message is returned

Title: Test Achievements - View Achievements
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User views their achievements
3. Achievements returns the user's achievements
Expected Result: The user's achievements are returned correctly

Title: Test Authentication System - Authenticate
Test Steps:
1. User enters their login credentials
2. Authentication System authenticates the user
3. Authentication System returns a success message
Expected Result: The user is authenticated correctly and a success message is returned

Title: Test Authentication System - Authorize
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User attempts to access a protected resource
3. Authentication System authorizes the user
4. Authentication System returns a success message
Expected Result: The user is authorized correctly and a success message is returned

Title: Test Notification System - Send Notification
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. Notification System sends a notification to the user
3. Notification System returns a success message
Expected Result: The notification is sent correctly and a success message is returned

Title: Test Notification System - Receive Notification
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. Notification System sends a notification to the user
3. User receives the notification
Expected Result: The notification is received correctly

Title: Test Web Server - Handle Request
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User sends a request to the web server
3. Web Server handles the request
4. Web Server returns a response
Expected Result: The request is handled correctly and a response is returned

Title: Test Web Server - Respond
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. User sends a request to the web server
3. Web Server handles the request and generates a response
4. Web Server returns the response
Expected Result: The response is generated correctly and returned

Title: Test Database - Insert Data
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. Data is inserted into the database
3. Database returns a success message
Expected Result: The data is inserted correctly into the database and a success message is returned

Title: Test Database - Retrieve Data
Test Steps:
1. User logs in
2. Data is retrieved from the database
3. Database returns the data
Expected Result: The data is retrieved correctly from the database

Title: Test Report Handler - Generate Report
Test Steps:
1. User provides consumption data
2. Report Handler generates a report based on the consumption data
3. Report Handler returns the generated report
Expected Result: The report is generated correctly based on the consumption data

Title: Test Report Handler - Send Report
Test Steps:
1. User generates a report
2. Report Handler sends the report to the user
3. Report Handler returns a success message
Expected Result: The report is sent correctly to the user and a success message is returned

Title: Test Report Handler - Report Data
Test Steps:
1. User provides consumption data
2. Report Handler processes the data and generates a report
3. Report Handler returns the report data
Expected Result: The report data is generated correctly based on the consumption data
